business_problem: Nomura Research Institute, a leading Japanese systems-integration and consulting firm, needed a way for its consultants and developers to build internal and customer-facing data applications quickly without long, custom-coded development cycles, while keeping data and applications close to its existing Oracle Database estate.
solution_summary: Nomura Research Institute (NRI), a leading Japanese systems-integration and consulting firm, standardized on Oracle APEX as its rapid application development platform on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure to accelerate internal IT and client-facing application delivery. By leveraging Oracle Database and OCI Kubernetes Engine, NRI delivered 11+ applications using APEX with approximately 65% reduction in development effort compared to traditional custom-code development, enabling consultants to focus on business logic rather than infrastructure.
business_outcome: NRI delivered 11+ applications on Oracle APEX with ~65% less development effort than traditional custom-code projects, accelerating internal IT and client-engagement delivery.
metrics: ~65% reduction in development effort vs traditional development
architecture_clues: Oracle APEX as standard low-code platform
Backed by Oracle Database on OCI
OCI Kubernetes Engine for hosting containerized services
evidence_quotes: Nomura Research Institute (NRI) standardized on Oracle APEX to deliver internal and client-facing applications quickly on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.
NRI delivered more than 11 applications on Oracle APEX, reducing development effort by approximately 65%.

solution_components.name: Oracle APEX
solution_components.role: Low-code rapid application development platform enabling NRI consultants to build internal and client-facing data applications 65% faster than custom development.

solution_components.name: Oracle Database
solution_components.role: Backing data store for all 11+ APEX applications; maintains consistency with NRI's existing Oracle Database estate.

solution_components.name: OCI Kubernetes Engine
solution_components.role: Container orchestration for hosting containerized APEX services and microservices.
